name: TC4 Wand Total Repair + Prior Systems Parity Pass
major_changes: TC4 cap modifiers and special copper/silver aspect modifiers applied to runtime costs.
Arcane Workbench and wand foci now consume modified vis cost instead of raw cost.
Elemental rods and primal staff got TC4 WandRodPrimalOnUpdate-style regeneration.
Wand NBT rod/cap components can be changed using TC4 component items in off-hand.
Focus pouch storage capped and warded-block checks expanded to focus actions.
Wand renderer scales staff rods and honors glowing rod light.
